description: In a quiet aftermath, Enoch and Koenig share a drink at the speakeasy, forging a budding friendship. Koenig expresses curiosity about S.H.I.E.L.D. and Chronicoms, while Enoch hints at Koenig's legacy, suggesting their encounter is the start of something special. This final, lighter scene offers a sense of hope and ties together the episode's themes of legacy and mentorship.
location: Koenig's speakeasy (Ernest Koenig's bar / S.H.I.E.L.D. safe house)

transcript.line: It is my specialty. I call it a Barracoolada.
Hmm. Ooh. That's a damn fine concoction.
I do, as you say, know my onions.
Oh, that, you do. You're hired. But I have a couple of conditions. First, I want to know more about this S.H.I.E.L.D. outfit. I feel like I could be a help there.
Indeed, you will. As will this fine establishment. What is the second condition?
I want to know all there is to know about robots.
Whatever you call yourselves. I-I find it fascinating.
My... My grandchildren? Enoch... this looks like the start of a marvelous friendship.
